title: Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A classic North African stew made with tender lamb, sweet spices, and a hint of cumin. This rich and flavorful dish is perfect for special occasions or cozy nights in.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, cinnamon, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the sweet paprika and stir to combine.
Add the chopped onion, olives, and enough water to cover the lamb.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
